tool_calls:
printf 'Only Team A:\n'
comm -23 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt | tee /tmp/only_a.txt
printf 'Count: %s\n\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/only_a.txt)"
printf 'Only Team B:\n'
comm -13 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt | tee /tmp/only_b.txt
printf 'Count: %s\n\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/only_b.txt)"
printf 'Both teams:\n'
comm -12 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt | tee /tmp/both.txt
printf 'Count: %s\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/both.txt)"
